title: xanthophytum olivaceum
intro: Xanthophytum olivaceum, also known as Yellow Ginger or Jahe Emas, is a type of flowering plant native to the tropical forests of Southeast Asia. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it useful in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Xanthophytum olivaceum include relief from pain and inflammation, improved digestion, and immune system support. In traditional herbal medicine, the plant is often prepared as a tea, capsule, or infused oil, and is also used in aromatherapy to promote relaxation and well-being.
